# Release filter configuration for release-matching-python-tags workflow
# Format: YAML with version, release_types, and variants

# Example 1: Only stable releases of 3.14
# version: 3.14.*
# release_types: [stable]
# variants: [default]

# Example 2: All release types (using YAML array syntax)
# version: 3.14.*
# release_types:
#   - stable
#   - beta
#   - rc
#   - alpha
# variants:
#   - default
#   - freethreaded

# Current configuration:
version: 3.14.*
release_types: [alpha, beta]
variants: [freethreaded]
